data.title: US Consumers Face Risks As Rising Cost Of Living, Job Market 'Cracks' Threaten Spending, Bank of America Warns
data.description: U.S. consumers struggling with rising housing costs, slower wage growth, and unemployment fears may have to cut back on discretionary spending.

data.title: Why Zillow Stock Is Trading Higher
data.description: Zillow shares are trading higher by 3.9% during Thursday's session. Shares of real estate and broker stocks are trading higher following strong February existing home sales data.
